ranking_methodology.general_formula: match_score = geo_score + mobility_score + property_type_score + budget_score + standing_score + services_score + freshness_score + availability_bonus + badges_bonus
ranking_methodology.ranking_principle: Score measures estimated compatibility, not absolute property quality

example.exceptional_property_bastos_low_score: Request = Odza -> score is low (wrong location)
example.average_property_odza_high_score: Request = Odza -> score is high (correct location)
